metrics.name: retrieval_recall_at_5
metrics.description: Proportion of relevant document chunks appearing in top-5 retrieval results

metrics.name: retrieval_precision_at_5
metrics.description: Proportion of top-5 retrieved chunks that are actually relevant

metrics.name: citation_precision
metrics.description: Proportion of AI citations that are verifiable against the evidence corpus

metrics.name: grounding_score
metrics.description: Ratio of grounded claims (with valid citations) to total claims in a response

metrics.name: hallucination_rate
metrics.description: Proportion of responses containing at least one fabricated or unverifiable citation

metrics.name: hypothesis_latency_p50_ms
metrics.description: Median end-to-end latency for hypothesis generation

metrics.name: hypothesis_latency_p95_ms
metrics.description: 95th percentile end-to-end latency for hypothesis generation

metrics.name: hypothesis_latency_p99_ms
metrics.description: 99th percentile end-to-end latency for hypothesis generation

metrics.name: cost_per_investigation_usd
metrics.description: Total estimated USD cost of AI API calls for one complete investigation

metrics.name: time_to_initial_hypothesis_minutes
metrics.description: Wall-clock time from evidence upload to first hypothesis displayed to user

metrics.name: hypothesis_rank_accuracy
metrics.description: Proportion of hypotheses where actual rank matches expected rank (±1 position)

metrics.name: root_cause_recall
metrics.description: Proportion of expected root causes identified by the AI
